2605.29833.title: OmniMatBench: A Human-Calibrated Multimodal Reasoning Benchmark Across 19 Materials Science Subfields
2605.29833.paper_summary: As multimodal language models play an increasingly important role in scientific research, materials science offers a critical testbed due to its interdisciplinary, multimodal, and application-driven nature. However, existing materials benchmarks mainly focus on property prediction, knowledge QA, or characterization understanding, leaving the broader reasoning process from materials knowledge to application underexplored. To fill this gap, we present OmniMatBench, a human-calibrated multimodal reasoning benchmark for materials science. OmniMatBench contains 3,171 expert-curated QA and calculation problems across 19 materials-science subfields, spanning fundamental materials knowledge, structural and engineering materials, materials processing and manufacturing, and functional and applied materials. We evaluate 13 open-source and closed-source MLLMs and find that the best model achieves only a 0.372 overall score, revealing a substantial gap in current materials-science reasoning. Further analysis shows strong variation across subfields, fixed reasoning heuristics, uneven materials knowledge, and limited high-level knowledge application under formula-, retrieval-, and code-assisted settings. OmniMatBench provides crucial insights into the capabilities and limitations of current MLLMs and establishes a foundation for reliable AI assistants in materials-science research.
2605.29833.paper_summary_zh: 隨著多模態語言模型在科學研究中扮演越來越重要的角色，材料科學因其跨學科、多模態和應用驅動的特性，提供了一個關鍵的測試平台。<lb/>然而，現有的材料基準主要集中在性質預測、知識問答或特徵理解上，從材料知識到應用的更廣泛推理過程尚未充分探索。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們提出了OmniMatBench，一個經過人類校準的材料科學多模態推理基準。<lb/>OmniMatBench包含3,171個專家策劃的問答和計算問題，涵蓋19個材料科學子領域，涉及基本材料知識、結構和工程材料、材料加工和製造，以及功能和應用材料。<lb/>我們評估了13個開源和閉源的多模態語言模型，發現最佳模型的整體得分僅為0.372，顯示出當前材料科學推理存在顯著差距。<lb/>進一步分析顯示，各子領域之間存在強烈變異、固定的推理啟發式、不均勻的材料知識，以及在公式、檢索和代碼輔助設置下有限的高級知識應用。<lb/>OmniMatBench為當前多模態語言模型的能力和局限性提供了關鍵見解，並為材料科學研究中的可靠人工智慧助手奠定了基礎。
2605.29833.author: Wanhao Liu et.al.
2605.29833.authors: Wanhao Liu, Jiaqing Xie, Qian Tan, Weida Wang, Jue Wang, Ran Sun, Zhuo Yang, Wanli Ouyang, Lei Bai, Tianfan Fu, Lu Chen, Xin Chen, Yuqiang Li
